table ip filter {
	chain output {
		type filter hook output priority filter; policy accept;
		ip daddr 169.254.169.254 counter packets 5 bytes 320 drop comment "imds-drop"
		ip daddr 169.254.0.0/16 counter packets 12 bytes 768 drop comment "linklocal-drop"
		oifname "sb-tun0" accept
		counter packets 0 bytes 0 log prefix "sbfw-drop " drop
	}
}
table ip6 filter6 {
	chain output6 {
		type filter hook output priority filter; policy drop;
		oif "lo" accept
	}
}
